name: Daftra Timesheet
html:
{{ doc.company or "Company Name" }}

Timesheet #: {{ doc.name }}
Date: {{ doc.get_formatted("invoice_date") }}

TIMESHEET INVOICE

Client: {{ doc.client_name or doc.client }}
Period: {{ doc.period_start or "" }} - {{ doc.period_end or "" }}
Hourly Rate: {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.hourly_rate or 0, currency=doc.currency) }}
{% for item in doc.items %} {% endfor %}
#TaskHoursRateAmount
{{ loop.index }} {{ item.description or item.item_name or item.item }} {{ item.qty or 0 }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(item.rate or doc.hourly_rate or 0, currency=doc.currency) }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(item.amount, currency=doc.currency) }}
Total Hours:{{ doc.total_hours or "" }} hrs
Subtotal:{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.total, currency=doc.currency) }}
VAT:{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.tax_amount or 0, currency=doc.currency) }}
Total:{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.total, currency=doc.currency) }}
{{ doc.company or "Company Name" }} - Timesheet Invoice
